I can schedule that — quick note from your calendar: 10:00–11:00 on 2024-05-19 is already booked (Project Kick-off) and there’s another meeting 11:00–11:30, so 10:00 won’t work.

Available one-hour options that day:
- 09:00–10:00
- 11:30–12:30 (earliest one-hour slot after your preferred time)
- any time after 11:30 if you prefer afternoon

Before I create the event, I need two quick clarifications:
1. Which time would you like me to use (09:00 or 11:30, or a different time after 11:30)? I’ll schedule for one hour.
2. Who should be invited? (If none, I’ll leave participants empty and only add it to your calendar.)
3. Title and short description — I can use a default:
   - Title: "Follow-up Meeting"
   - Description: "Follow-up to review progress, action items, and next steps."  
   Or you can provide your own short description and title.

Also tell me if you want a location set (e.g., Office or virtual link). Once you confirm, I’ll create the event.
